close_reason: Decided: keep req_llm for the ash_ai path (local-doc extraction + reasoning Exa can't do). Provider is swappable; ZAI key refresh is an optional user action for named RFP contacts.
description: ZAI/GLM is the only LLM call site today (ContactExtractor name step) and degrades to regex without it. Keep req_llm in the stack for the ash_ai/AshLua direction (local-doc extraction + reasoning Exa can't do). Action: refresh the expired ZAI_API_KEY, or pick another req_llm provider (Anthropic etc.). Not a blocker -- web contacts use Exa's own LLM; only RFP-text name extraction needs this.

comments.text: DECISION: keep req_llm in the stack. Rationale: it's the on-ramp to the ash_ai/AshLua direction (local-document extraction from RFP PDFs + reasoning/classification/drafting that Exa cannot do). Today it's used only by ContactExtractor's name step and degrades to regex without it; web extraction uses Exa's own LLM. 'ZAI' = just the current req_llm provider (swappable for Anthropic/etc.). ACTION (user, when named RFP contacts are wanted): refresh the expired ZAI_API_KEY or set another req_llm provider key. Not a blocker for any current functionality.

title: Decide/refresh LLM provider (ZAI/req_llm) for ash_ai path
